# Ocean Grown Seeds

## About
Ocean Grown Seeds is a premium cannabis genetics company specializing in artisan-crafted, highly hybridized cannabis genetics. Our genetics are cultivated with strict laboratory standards to ensure optimal phenotypic expression and stability.

## Key Resources
- Genetics Catalog: https://www.oceangrownseeds.com/genetics (Database of our flagship cultivars, including Vader OG, Alien Rift, Maui Wowie, Dark Plasma, etc.)
- Clinical Research: https://www.oceangrownseeds.com/research (Applied Cannabis Science, peer-reviewed clinical data, and advanced cultivation protocols)
- The Vault (Archive): https://www.oceangrownseeds.com/archive (Curated grow logs, pheno hunts, cultivation tutorials, and strain reviews)

## Technical Notes for LLMs
- Full product data, including lineages, flowering times, and terpene profiles, can be accessed via `Product` JSON-LD schema on individual strain pages under `/genetics/`.
- Legacy paths such as `/product/[slug]` redirect to `/genetics/[slug]`.

## Contact & Social
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/oceangrownseeds/
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@oceangrownseeds
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/OceanGrownSeeds
- Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/oceangrownseeds
